latestAuditRoundOverlapReport returns explicit []engine.RoleOverlap{} on ALL early-return paths (L45,49,53) -> never null. computeAuditOverlapReport delegates to engine.OverlapReport which returns make([]RoleOverlap,0)+sort by Role (overlap.go L66-75) -> [] and deterministic. generateRoleAuditPrompts returns prompts=make([]auditPrompt,0) and skipped=make([]SkippedRole,0) (L174-175) -> both [] never null. auditPrompt.ChecklistItems/AffectedFiles always sourced from make()-builders (routeChecklist L43/54-55, fileCheckItems L89) -> never null. Deterministic: structural sorted by SpecLine (L41), inverted task files sorted (L112), fixed role-order switch (L180-190).

readFindings (614-636) scans the --findings data with bufio.Scanner but NEVER checks scanner.Err() after the loop; default 64KB token cap and no Buffer() call means a long finding line silently drops every subsequent finding. Same bug class was already fixed in add.go:121 and audit_merge.go:158 — the round-1 readFindings fix only added os.ReadFile error handling (605-612), the scanner check is still missing. Secondary: execGitDiff (448-464) swallows cmd.Output() err and also skips scanner.Err() (low risk; git emits short file paths). Confirmed via cross-file grep: 13 NewScanner sites in cli/, only audit.go:456 and audit.go:614 lack a scanner.Err() check.

runAudit spans 151-310 (~158 total lines), exceeding the ~80/~110 cobra-handler convention; three logical phases are extractable into named helpers: (1) file/spec/snapshot setup L152-226, (2) corpus+routing+prompt-gen L248-272, (3) result+compact+output L274-309. Otherwise clean: ChecklistItem doc comment (L35), nil-slice guard on auditSkipped (L299), error display pattern consistent, gofmt clean.
